description: Flatten all 3D polylines and breaklines in the TopoCal project 'foothills_3d_site.tcp' by setting their Z-elevations to 0.00 while preserving X and Y coordinates. Export the resulting 2D drawing as an AutoCAD DXF file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\architectural_basemap_2d.dxf'. Ensure existing surveyed lines are modified rather than replaced or deleted.
